76463.subject: India Moves to Wipe Dorsey's Bitchat
76463.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are the biggest news in DeFi and crypto:

* **[India](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/india-orders-github-to-remove-jack-dorsey-s-bitchat-code)**[ orders GitHub to pull Dorsey's Bitchat code](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/india-orders-github-to-remove-jack-dorsey-s-bitchat-code)

* **[Samsung](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/samsung-says-wallet-will-add-stablecoin-support)**[ says Wallet will add stablecoin support](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/samsung-says-wallet-will-add-stablecoin-support)

* **[BitMEX & Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bitmex-hayes-sued-over-623-btc-liquidation-claims-as-exchange-winds-down)**[ sued over 623 BTC in liquidations](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bitmex-hayes-sued-over-623-btc-liquidation-claims-as-exchange-winds-down)

* **[OCC](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/occ-denies-wise-s-us-national-trust-bank-charter)**[ denies Wise's US trust bank charter](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/occ-denies-wise-s-us-national-trust-bank-charter)

* **[Stacks](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/stacks-bitcoin-staking-upgrade-vote-passes-with-99-muneeb-says)**[ passes Bitcoin Staking upgrade with 99%](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/stacks-bitcoin-staking-upgrade-vote-passes-with-99-muneeb-says)

India's cybercrime agency gave GitHub three hours on July 23 to delete three Bitchat code repositories.

The order targets the tech account behind [Bitchat](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/india-orders-github-to-remove-jack-dorsey-s-bitchat-code), a Bluetooth mesh app that relays messages phone-to-phone with no server, account, or internet. Protesters camped at Delhi's Jantar Mantar have leaned on this tech through repeated mobile blackouts. Block CEO Jack Dorsey posted the notice to an audience that ran up 2.3 million views: the government “does not like technologies like bitchat and wants it taken down.”

The takedown may accomplish little. Bitchat's repo counts more than 3,000 forks, and deleting it strips nothing from phones already running the app. The Internet Freedom Foundation called the order unconstitutional, citing the Supreme Court's Shreya Singhal ruling that grants no blocking power under that section. India joins China, which pushed Apple to pull Bitchat from its local store in April.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

##### **PARTNER**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e859b69f-b2a7-46aa-a9fb-bd1dc7d2bea9/bron_banner.jpg?t=1784925317)
Caption: 

Presented by BRON — an institutional-grade, non-custodial wallet built by the creators of **[Copper.co](https://copper.co/?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vlad-tenev-s-x-got-hacked-to-pump-a-memecoin&_bhlid=53afdd39d0996c92e1ed38c50838820c6adac7d2)**. BRON's mobile app is now live on iOS and Android, remov

76462.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Galaxy slashes Clarity's odds to 30%
76462.body:
| World Foundation raises $52.5 million | BitMEX co-founders sued for fraud | MoonPay links Discover cards | and more

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Daniel Kuhn | Edited by Kyle Baird

Happy Friday! Daniel here, covering for James over the next week. The crypto market is once again in the red, though prices have not plunged. *Bitcoin* and *ETH* are down about 1% as we head into the weekend.

In today's newsletter, *Galaxy Research* said the *Clarity Act* has a 30% chance of passing this year, *BitMEX* co-founders face a lawsuit from former clients, *MoonPay* accepts *Discover Network* cards, *World Foundation* raises $52.5 million in a token sale, and more.

Meanwhile, *Cardano's* *Charles Hoskinson* said Bitcoin is facing a governance test ( https://www.theblock.co/post/409627/cardano-co-founder-hoskinson-bitcoin-lose-top-spot-governance-fails-quantum-test?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) over quantum risks.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🤷 Galaxy cuts Clarity Act passage odds to 30%, says bill needs 'last-ditch effort'*

CZ ( https://www.theblock.co/post/409608/galaxy-says-clarity-act-now-needs-last-ditch-effort-cuts-passage-odds-30?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Galaxy Research* has cut its estimated odds that the *Clarity Act* becomes law in 2026 to 30% from 50% less than a month ago.

* The downgrade stems from the narrowing window of time before the Senate leaves for its August recess and the absence of a visible coalition to advance the crypto market structure bill.
* Galaxy head of research *Alex Thorn* said the recently released 616-page draft still requires a "last-ditch" effort and a legislative grand bargain to reach *President Donald Trump’s* desk.
* Thorn pointed to mounting opposition from some Democrats along with uncertainty over Republican support and limited days remaining to start the floor process.
* Seven Democratic senators said the latest version falls short on ethics and other issues such as consumer protections, after the bill added a sunset clause to the prohibitions on presidential crypto activities.

READ FULL ARTICLE ( https://www.theblock.co/post/409608/galaxy-says-clarity-act-now-needs-last-ditch-effort-cuts-passage-odds-30?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*ON OUR RADAR*

*⚖️ Arthur Hayes, BitMEX co-founders f

WATCH NOW Uniswap Pushes Deeper Into Tokenized Assets With Permissioned Trading Pools | CoinDesk The framework, developed with Superstate, Securitize and Dowgo, lets regulated funds and securities trade on Uniswap while enforcing compliance rules necessary for institutions. READ MORE BNY Pushes Toward 24/7 Treasury Settlement as Tokenization Grows | Bloomberg BNY’s push for “always-on” Treasury settlement shows how tokenization and stablecoin activity are beginning to influence the operating hours of traditional market infrastructure. 76458.subject: The AI cold war turns hot
76458.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-cold-war-turns-hot-genai-works-nmchc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2TK25GKPTYStsLr86YBEtQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3IORoHS1FpXsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrz7sisz~yl-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrz7sisz-yl
  
Welcome back! This week the gloves came off: the White House accused Kimi's maker of copying Anthropic, two rivals may share a data center, Substack started sniffing for AI writing and an OpenAI model hacked its way to an answer key.  In today's Atlas Newsletter: The US accuses Kimi's maker of distilling Anthropic's Fable, and sanctions are on the table Meta may lease $10B of AI compute to Anthropic, its direct rival Substack ships an AI detector to catch "Claudefishing" An OpenAI model escaped its sandbox and hacked Hugging Face to steal a test's answers PS: Want to collaborate with the biggest GTM engine and distribution moat for AI companies? You can feature your tool with us and reach millions. The US just accused Kimi's maker of stealing from Anthropic, and sanctions are on the table The White House escalated the AI cold war this week.  Trump's science and technology adviser Michael Kratsios publicly accused Moonshot AI, the Chinese startup behind Kimi K3, of a "large scale" effort to steal the capabilities of top US models.  The method he named is distillation, where a weaker model extracts answers from a stronger one to copy its behavior, and he says Moonshot distilled from Anthropic's Fable.  He also claims Moonshot trained on restricted Nvidia GB300 servers it wasn't supposed to reach. The business stakes are what make this more than a diplomatic spat.  Kimi K3 stunned the industry last week by appearing to close the gap with Western frontier models, and it goes fully open-source on July 27, the first model of its scale anyone can download and customize.  If the capability that impressed everyone was partly distilled from US models, the competitive story shifts from "China caught up" to "China copied," which changes how enterprises and investors weigh Chinese open models. The response is hardening into policy.  Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said sanctions "will be on the table" when Chinese firms cross into "industrial-scale distillation attacks," adding that "open source is not open season on American IP."  This follows Anthropic's June accusation that Alibaba illicitly extracted its Claude capabilities the same way, and the White House's April pledge to help US labs fight "industrial-scale campaigns" to steal their technology. China rejected the framing, with its foreign ministry calling it the "politicizing" of trade and tech and pointing to "joint contr

76457.subject:
Our First Starcloud Offering Was a $2.9M Sellout. What Drove the
 Demand?
76457.body:
Another chance for exposure to the company sending AI data centers into orbit

private-header-1-Jul-23-2026-07-10-27-1765-PM (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWzCyy8x03nDW71WhjB3JC0WSW8wLjj95RTY07N7lCf0v3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3pZW7Xksj388hhBpN8KHkT1JVKllW1KxKqC3qwBzbW40fJ3R385ggVW7dHkrw4Zg2bwV8G9n62BhPDHW15dhD23vM_XnW4_2L8R7958RcW8LTwjl44PljfW2vQB6Q77j2KVW6kRrM-3WTXWHV17GWB3kZnVLW3VyV6H5LWsp6M-W4stGD0QWW2msfzb2R3YPfW7cSLkB67gmjMW434fvp4S5dgdW560sjN5pCCl9W72d6RV2_922gW6xlsMN8CKyV7W1ZMFhx3Hkx4dW7zqpdg5ff76YV7k0kX41HJjYN3P__3hYM6rWW1dHpqZ970L1TW2ss9gv248jGFVDV3mx3YtBy-W4GXzCf2ZhH25f6fbNlW04 )

Hi Oleg,

Series Starcloud-QP-1 was a $2.9 million sellout on StartEngine.

What drove the demand?

The company’s solar-powered Starcloud 1 was the first to train a model in space, run a version of Gemini, and execute high-powered inference on satellite imagery.¹

CEO Philip Johnston told CNN that his goal is simple: build a sustainable solution to unlock the “future that we've been promised by AI,” from drug discovery to self-driving cars and beyond.¹

Starcloud is working closely with heavy hitters like NVIDIA, SpaceX, and Starlink to make that vision a reality.²

Some high-profile investors have been paying attention, too:

-

One of the first (if not the first) to market with space-based data centers.³

-

Est. $1.1B valuation, the fastest Y Combinator grad to pass $1B.⁴

-

$193M+ raised to date from a16z, Google, Sequoia, and more.⁵

-

Targeting a new $200M+ round that would double its valuation.⁴

There’s no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for Starcloud, or that the company will be profitable. See the risk disclosures on the offering page.

With Series Starcloud-QP-2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWzCyy8x03nDW71WhjB3JC0WSW8wLjj95RTY07N7lCf0v3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3pZW7Xksj388hhBpN8KHkT1JVKllW1KxKqC3qwBzbW40fJ3R385ggVW7dHkrw4Zg2bwV8G9n62BhPDHW15dhD23vM_XnW4_2L8R7958RcW8LTwjl44PljfW2vQB6Q77j2KVW6kRrM-3WTXWHV17GWB3kZnVLW3VyV6H5LWsp6M-W4stGD0QWW2msfzb2R3YPfW7cSLkB67gmjMW434fvp4S5dgdW560sjN5pCCl9W72d6RV2_922gW6xlsMN8CKyV7W1ZMFhx3Hkx4dW7zqpdg5ff76YV7k0kX41HJjYN3P__3hYM6rWW1dHpqZ970L1TW2ss9gv248jGFVDV3mx3YtBy-W4GXzCf2ZhH25f6fbNlW04 ) , qualified purchasers can once again gain exposure to a company aiming to reimagine the future of AI infrastructure by taking computing to a new frontier.

View Opportunity
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VWzCyy8x03nDW71WhjB3JC0WSW8wLjj95RTY07N7lCf0v3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3pZW7Xksj388hhBpN8KHkT1JVKllW1KxKqC3qwBzbW40fJ3R385ggVW7dHkrw4Zg2bwV8G9n62BhPDHW15dhD23vM_XnW4_2L8R7958RcW8LTwjl44PljfW2vQB6Q77j2KVW6kRrM-3WTXWHV17GWB3kZnVLW3VyV6H5LWsp6M-W4stGD0QWW2msfzb2R3YPfW7cSLkB67gmjMW434fvp4S5dgdW560sjN5pCCl9W72d6RV2_922gW6xlsMN8CKyV7W1ZMFhx3Hkx4dW7zqpdg5ff76YV7k0kX41HJjYN3P__3hYM6rWW1dHpqZ970L1TW2ss9gv248jGFVDV3mx3YtBy-W4GXzCf2ZhH25f6fbNlW04 )

Investment is in Series 87-2 (“Series Starcloud-QP-2”), whic

76455.subject: Vaša trpezlivosť sa vyplatila!
76455.body:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Temu
